title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Ambrane - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Ambrane - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Ambrane! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Howrah team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Ambrane:
Ambrane is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ambrane!
